name: BaseConvo_Coral Orphanage
_source: s;Shula;Hey, Your Highness.|The kids back at the orphanage wanted to thank everyone for saving them.|This cost a lot so you better{br}appreciate it.
s;Krista;Miss Shula, I really appreciate this, but--

s;Shula;Don't even start, Princess.|{c:e;Shula;NormalBlink}I already gave that spiel to the kiddos, but they insisted on doing this.|{c:e;Shula;Smile}So go ahead and take it! I don't wanna tell them that you said no to their gift.
s;Krista;Oh, you just HAD to pull the "you'll make the children sad" card, didn't you?|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink,Smile}Alright, alright, I'll take it. Thanks a lot.
